mapper.sql: select l.log_id, l.user_id, l.delta_cents, l.balance_after_cents, l.type, l.related_order_no, l.related_recharge_id, l.remark, l.operator, l.create_time, u.nickname from fish_balance_log l left join fish_user u on l.user_id = u.user_id
mapper.insert: insert into fish_balance_log (user_id, delta_cents, balance_after_cents, type, related_order_no, related_recharge_id, remark, operator, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{deltaCents}, #{balanceAfterCents}, #{type}, #{relatedOrderNo}, #{relatedRechargeId}, #{remark}, #{operator}, sysdate())
